title: 3 Great Stocks On Sale In The Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF
text: 12 companies in the Vanguard Mid-Cap Growth ETF have lost over 20% of their value in the past year. ANSYS is a special company on sale that helps manufacturing companies save time and money.
